Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Approving Receivers Final Account And Report, Discharging Receiver, Exonerating Receivers Bond, Dissolving Preliminary Injunction, Terminating Receivership And Directing Payment Of Receivership Surplus
Off Calendar Mar-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Katharine Bryant, 415-227-0900 for Plaintiff/Moving party JP Morgan Chase Bank, N.A.
No appearance by Defendant.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A Motion For Order Approving Receivers Final Account And Report, Discharging Receiver, Exonerating Receivers Bond, Dissolving Preliminary Injunction, Terminating Receivership And Directing Payment Of Receivership Surplus is GRANTED. Order signed in Open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For: (1) Appointment Of A Receiver; (2) Preliminary Injunction; Or, In The Alternative; (3) Temporary Restraining Order And Order To Show Cause Why A Receiver Should Not Be Appointed And Why A Preliminary Injunction Should Not Be Granted
Off Calendar Apr-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mia Blackler, Esq. (415-227-0900) for Plaintiff/Moving party JP MORGAN CHASE BANK.
No other Appearance.

Plaintiff reports matter is uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A Notice Of Motion And Motion For: (1)A ppointment Of A Receiver; (2) Preliminary Injunction; Or, In The Alternative; (3) Temporary Restraining Order And Order To Show Cause Why A Receiver Should Not Be Appointed And Why A Preliminary Injunction Should Not Be Granted. Granted. Bond is due on 5/3/16. Order appointing receiver and preliminary injunction in aid therof is signed. (see scanned order for details)Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
